zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Henri III de Vaudémont於1284年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，他的父親Henri II de Vaudémont29歲，母親Hélissende de Vergy17歲。他於1306年與Isabelle de Lorraine在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年1月21日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Henri III de Vaudémont于1284年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，他的父亲Henri II de Vaudémont29岁，母亲Hélissende de Vergy17岁。他于1306年与Isabelle de Lorraine在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年1月21日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Henri III de Vaudémont was born in 1284, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Henri II de Vaudémont, was 29 and his mother, Hélissende de Vergy, was 17. He married Isabelle de Lorraine in 1306, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 21 January 1348, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Henri III de Vaudémont est né en 1284, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Henri II de Vaudémont, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hélissende de Vergy, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Lorraine en 1306, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1348, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Henri III de Vaudémont 1284 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri II de Vaudémont 29 und seine Mutter Hélissende de Vergy 17. Er hat 1306 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich Isabelle de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1348 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Henri III de Vaudémont è nato il nel 1284 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Henri II de Vaudémont, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Hélissende de Vergy, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Lorraine nel 1306, nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 gennaio 1348, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Henri III de Vaudémontが1284年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Henri II de Vaudémontは29歳，母Hélissende de Vergyは17歳であった。1306年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントでIsabelle de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年1月21日に故郷で64歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Henri III de Vaudémont(이)가 1284년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri II de Vaudémont(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélissende de Vergy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1306년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 Isabelle de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 1월 21일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Henri III de Vaudémont nasceu em 1284, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Henri II de Vaudémont, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hélissende de Vergy, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Lorraine em 1306, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1348, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Henri III de Vaudémont родился в 1284 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri II de Vaudémont было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélissende de Vergy, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Lorraine в 1306 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 января 1348 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Henri III de Vaudémont nació en 1284, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Henri II de Vaudémont, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Hélissende de Vergy, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Lorraine en 1306, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de enero de 1348, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
